title: A Severa
writer: Júlio Dantas, Jacques B. Brunius, René Clair
actors: Dina Teresa, António Luis Lopes, Antonio Lavradio
plot: The (too brief) life, the (ardent) loves and the (too early) death of Maria Severa Onofirana (1820-1846), better known as "A Severa", a beautiful gypsy who, besides being a prostitute, sang in the taverns of the Mouraria area in L...
